title: Add Integration to "Add Files" Dropdown under Rich Text
excerpt:
Hey, 
I was wondering if it is possible to add an custom integration to the Dropdown Menu “Add Files” that is just under the Rich Text inside of a Task. I added a Screenshot for the visualisation. 
Thanks for any hints. 
…

posts.author: JulianIff (Iff)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey,

I was wondering if it is possible to add an custom integration to the Dropdown Menu “Add Files” that is just under the Rich Text inside of a Task. I added a Screenshot for the visualisation.

Thanks for any hints.

Cheers
Julian

Screenshot 2023-03-29 at 21.12.491178×878 55.2 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @JulianIff and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

As of today, that is not possible.

Having said that, I have created a request for our team so hopefully we might add it in the future.

Cheers,
Matias
